[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Whitepaper currency audit: refresh snapshot + draft 2024-2026 amendments
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/246
  
  Details:
  Assessed whether the main whitepaper (truesight.me/whitepaper) is current given recent ecosystem changes. Pulled the live ~35KB Google Doc (the repo snapshot was the stale 1.7KB Feb-6 stub) and audited it: directionally intact (mission, values, metagame, guild lifecycle, 100 TDG/hr + 1 TDG/USD rates, governor cadence) but its amendments log ends Nov 2023 and the operational layer has diverged. Deliverables: (1) refreshed WHITEPAPER_SNAPSHOT.md to live content with a provenance header; (2) added proposal_drafts/WHITEPAPER_AMENDMENTS_2024-2026_DRAFT.md, a Town-Hall-ready redline (marked DRAFT, not ratified) covering signed-event/DApp/Edgar contribution intake, AI agents as contributors, Telegram-primary + archive-only Beer Hall, off-chain ledger + public transparency surfaces (on-chain deferred), managed ledgers/multi-currency/AGL syndicates, and new initiatives; plus a needs-a-decision section and an explicit not-changed list. Did NOT edit the governance-owned Google Doc.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
